sectionHeading.title: Milestones that reflect consistency and execution.
sectionHeading.description: These outcomes highlight discipline, technical depth, and the ability to sustain long-term progress.

items.title: Solved 100+ DSA Problems
items.description: Maintained long-term consistency across arrays, trees, graphs, dynamic programming, and interview-style problem sets.

items.title: Built and Iterated Multiple Portfolio Projects

items.title: Competitive Coding and Challenge Participation
